Document:
# Civilian [color=#6c6a78]Civilian[/color] is a catchall "department" for jobs that don't fit well into any other area.
These jobs tend to have little to no responsibility, with the only expectation being that you aren't a complete shitter.
## Personnel Roughly in order of how real of a job they are. Results may vary.
## Apes Together Strong Being somewhat outcast, making friends with fellow [color=#6c6a78]Civilians[/color] can be crucial to your prosperity, or even survival. Maybe laughing at the clown's jokes will convince him to break you out of prison later on... Sometimes when the going gets tough, even the poor janitors have to fend off xenomorph infestations.
